entities.context: SQLite database table storing daily resting heart rate readings

entities.name: goals

entities.name: SQLite
entities.context: Database engine used to store and query health metrics (resting HR, sleep)

relationships.context: Queries daily_resting_hr table to compute 30-day average resting heart rate
Summarizes sleep data alongside resting HR in the metrics report
Connects via sqlite3.Connection to query health data
Reads from daily_resting_hr table for current and prior 30-day windows
Weekly minutes are evaluated against goals.weekly_minutes threshold
Weekly active days are evaluated against goals.weekly_days threshold
Both are health vitals tracked together in the 30-day metrics summary
